_comment: Add this to your MCP client (e.g. Claude Desktop). The npx form needs no clone and no npm publish — it runs the server straight from GitHub. Once the package is on npm, use "eds-mcp-server" instead of "github:Edwson/eds-mcp". To run from a local clone instead: command "node", args ["server.js"], cwd "/absolute/path/to/eds-mcp".
